title: Evolving Sword
description: Transform your humble wooden sword into a legendary weapon that grows stronger with every battle you fight.
body:
# Evolving Sword Mod
![Title of Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4545eedc8723216dc1c4f4e688898c177677a636_0.webp)
**Transform your humble wooden sword into a legendary weapon that grows stronger with every battle you fight.**

## Description

Tired of replacing your weapons every time you find better materials? The Evolving Sword mod revolutionizes combat progression by introducing a single weapon that evolves alongside your adventures. Instead of crafting multiple swords, you'll nurture one blade from its humble wooden origins to an ultimate Ender-tier legendary weapon.

### The Evolution Journey

Your adventure begins deep underground, mining the mysterious **Evolving Stone Ore** - a rare mineral that pulses with transformative energy. Craft your first Evolving Sword and watch as it hungers for experience, growing more powerful with every mob you defeat.

**Seven Evolution Tiers Await:**
- **Wood** → **Stone** → **Iron** → **Gold** → **Diamond** → **Netherite** → **Ender**

Each evolution isn't just a stat boost - it's a complete transformation that unlocks new abilities:

### Unleash Devastating Abilities

**🗡️ Enhanced Combat**
- Extended attack reach that grows with each tier
- Increased attack speed for lightning-fast strikes  
- Life steal to sustain yourself in prolonged battles
- Bleeding effects that make enemies suffer over time

**⚡ Supernatural Powers**
- Movement speed bonuses for swift battlefield mobility
- Fire and lava immunity at higher tiers
- **Teleportation** - The ultimate Ender sword lets you blink across the battlefield

**📈 Strategic Progression**
- Bonus experience from all mob kills accelerates your growth
- Each tier requires more experience, creating meaningful progression choices
- Visual evolution - watch your sword transform as it grows stronger

### Highly Customizable Experience

Server owners and players love the extensive configuration options:
- Adjust XP requirements to match your server's progression speed
- Fine-tune ability values for perfect balance
- Enable/disable specific abilities to create unique gameplay experiences

### Quick Start Guide

1. **Explore and Mine** - Find Evolving Stone Ore in both regular stone and deepslate layers
2. **Forge Your Destiny** - Craft your first sword (2 Evolving Stones + 1 Stick, vertical pattern)
3. **Battle and Grow** - Fight mobs to gain bonus experience with your evolving sword
4. **Evolve** - Press Middle Mouse Button when you have enough XP to unlock the next tier
5. **Become Legendary** - Progress through all seven tiers to achieve ultimate power

## FAQ

**Q: How is this different from just crafting better swords?**  
A: Instead of replacing weapons, you develop an emotional connection with one blade that grows with you. Each evolution unlocks unique abilities impossible with vanilla weapons.

**Q: Will this make the game too easy?**  
A: The mod is balanced around progression - early tiers provide modest bonuses, while game-changing abilities require significant time investment to unlock.

**Q: Can I use this on my server?**  
A: Absolutely! The mod works flawlessly on multiplayer servers and includes extensive config options for server balance.

**Q: How do I repair my evolving sword?**  
A: Use Evolving Stone in an anvil to repair any tier of evolving sword. This makes Evolving Stone valuable throughout your entire progression, not just for initial crafting.

**Q: Do I lose my enchantments and custom name when evolving?**  
A: No! Your sword keeps all enchantments and custom names through every evolution. The blade remembers its entire history as it grows stronger.

---

## Available in 11 Languages

Full localization support for global players:  
English • Spanish (Spain & Chile) • German • French • Italian • Portuguese (Brazil) • Russian • Japanese • Korean • Chinese (Simplified)

---

## Support & Feedback

Join thousands of players who've transformed their Minecraft combat experience! I actively welcome suggestions, balance feedback, and bug reports to keep improving this mod for the community.
